Tools

Interactive entry points

First-version tools are simple, readable, and designed for later database or account-system migration.

Calculate a life path number from a birth date.

Name Number Calculator

Convert an English name into a simple numerology number.

Personal Year Calculator

Estimate a personal-year theme for planning and reflection.

FAQ

Questions people ask before trusting the site

No. Numerology often calculates personal numbers, while Chinese lucky numbers are more language and culture based.
